history.lean_note: I lean YES (my prob 78%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
history.rationale_summary: Trump endorsed Mazzei (May 29) in a Trump-loyal state, but a 9-way field makes an outright June 16 win unlikely and likely forces an Aug 25 runoff — which sits awkwardly against this market's June-30 settlement. Treating it as eventual-nomination, ~78%; flagged low conviction for the resolution-timing ambiguity.

history.lean_note: I lean YES (my prob 55%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
history.rationale_summary: OK primary already held Jun 16; now a 2-way Aug 25 runoff Drummond (26.3%) vs Mazzei (26.0%). Mazzei has Trump endorsement + favorable transfer of Merrick's America-First bloc; Drummond led R1 with higher statewide name ID. Net slight Mazzei edge.

history.rationale_summary: Near-tied first round (Mazzei 26.0% vs Drummond 26.3%) makes the leader edge meaningless; the dominant signal is Trump's active 'COMPLETE and TOTAL' endorsement plus his June 22 branding of Drummond a 'FAKE Republican' in the most Trump-loyal state, into a low-turnout base-heavy runoff electorate. Eliminated ~48% (Merrick MAGA, Keating mixed-right) tilt anti-establishment and Gov. Stitt won't backstop Drummond; tempered because the endorsement was already public yet Drummond still narrowly led round one.
